title: BEM-589 record operator choice
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
decisions=Path('governance/operator_decisions'); decisions.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
handoffs=Path('governance/tasks/pending'); handoffs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'OPERATOR_DECISION_CHAT_FALLBACK.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-589 | Operator Decision Chat Fallback'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:34 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Правило'+sep+sep+'Если Telegram intake временно не зафиксировал ответ, но оператор явно дал ответ в текущем чате/скриншоте, GPT может создать decision record с источником `chat_fallback_after_telegram_403`.'+sep+sep+'## Условие'+sep+'Такой fallback допустим только если ответ оператора однозначен: `1`, `2`, `3`, `да`, `подтверждаю` или текстовое решение.'+sep+sep+'## Результат'+sep+'Создаётся `governance/operator_decisions/<decision_id>.json` и handoff куратору.'+sep)

decision_id='bem584_decision_format_live_test'
decision={
  'schema_version':'operator_decision.v1',
  'decision_id':decision_id,
  'source':'chat_fallback_after_telegram_403',
  'operator_choice':'1',
  'selected_option':'Короткая таблица',
  'question':'Какой формат Telegram-сообщения использовать для решений оператора?',
  'raw_text':'1',
  'status':'received',
  'handoff_to':'curator',
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:34 (UTC+3)',
  'evidence':'Operator replied 1 in Telegram screenshot and then ordered to continue without participation.'
}
decision_path=decisions/(decision_id+'.json')
decision_path.write_text(json.dumps(decision,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

handoff=handoffs/('operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.md')
handoff.write_text('# Operator Decision Handoff | '+decision_id+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:34 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Decision'+sep+'Operator selected option 1: Короткая таблица.'+sep+sep+'## Source'+sep+'chat_fallback_after_telegram_403; Telegram reply intake returned HTTP 403, but operator choice was explicit in conversation.'+sep+sep+'## Curator action'+sep+'Route this decision into the internal contour. Adopt short readable comparison table as canonical operator decision Telegram format. Continue implementing reply intake hardening separately.'+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)

report=reports/'bem589_record_operator_choice_from_chat.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-589 | Record Operator Choice From Chat | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:34 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Result'+sep+'Operator choice `1` recorded as decision JSON and curator handoff created.'+sep+sep+'## Decision'+sep+'Use short readable comparison table as canonical operator decision Telegram format.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(decision_path)+sep+'- '+str(handoff)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'operator_decision_recorded_from_chat','cycle_id':'bem589-record-operator-choice-from-chat','source':'gpt','status':'completed','decision_file':str(decision_path),'handoff_file':str(handoff),'operator_choice':'1','selected_option':'Короткая таблица','blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:34 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem589_record_operator_choice_from_chat']={'status':'completed','decision_file':str(decision_path),'handoff_file':str(handoff),'operator_choice':'1','selected_option':'Короткая таблица','blocker':None}
state['operator_decision_format']='short_readable_comparison_table'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:34 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem589_record_operator_choice_from_chat.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-589 PASS: operator choice 1 recorded from chat fallback and handed off to curator.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(decision_path),str(handoff),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Recorded operator choice 1 from chat fallback and created curator handoff')
"""
No issue comments.
